song.title: Come Out of the Dark
song.keywords: coming out song, addiction recovery, mental health, LGBTQ+ musical, gay musical theatre, shame, self-acceptance, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Come Out of the Dark' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Come Out of the Dark Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Powerful musical theatre song about liberation from shame, addiction, and closets. 'No shame no chains just shining bright.'

twitter.title: Come Out of the Dark Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus
twitter.description: From The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical). 'The illness isn't who you are - You're a fire you're a star.'

essay: "Come Out of the Dark" is a powerful theatrical anthem from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical), addressing the profound themes of coming out, addiction recovery, and breaking free from shame.

The song carries a dual message of liberation: it speaks to both the LGBTQ+ experience of coming out of the closet and the universal struggle of coming forward about addiction, illness, and mental health challenges. With the powerful declaration "The illness isn't who you are - You're a fire you're a star," the song refuses to let shame define anyone's identity.
song.lyricsHtml:
Hey you in the back row
I see you hiding low
No shame in your story
Let the whole world know

We've all got secrets
We've all got scars
We've danced in shadows
Chased the wrong stars

But baby the truth it sets you free
No sickness owns your destiny

Don't be quiet
Don't disguise
Don't let the fear live in your eyes
Step into the light take a stand
Your story's power is in your hands

Come out come out of the dark tonight
No shame no chains just shining bright
The illness isn't who you are
You're a fire you're a star
Come out come out come out
Come out tonight

So what if you stumbled
So what if you fell
Every saint has a sinner's tale to tell
Addiction's a thief but it don't define
Raise your voice this life is mine

Don't be quiet
Don't disguise
Don't let the shame live in your eyes
Step into the light sing it loud
You've got a chorus you've got a crowd

Come out come out of the dark tonight
No shame no chains just shining bright
The illness isn't who you are
You're a fire you're a star
Come out come out come out
Come out tonight

Closets are for costumes not for your truth
So step out shine out we're living proof

Come out come out of the dark tonight
No shame no chains just shining bright
The illness isn't who you are
You're a fire you're a star
Come out come out come out
Come out tonight

Now go live your life and take a bow
